**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the spatial semantic and academic incubator powerful circuit breaker probe. The unfounded Apple consumer electronics and transnational OEM ecology in the original data has been 100% erased. This is an entity with extreme 'sci-fi colors' in its name and business license: named 'Tianji Aviation' (Skyline Aviation), officially classified as 'Electronic Device Manufacturing,' and wildly stacking top-tier heavy industry vocabulary in its license such as 'drones, aerial vehicle production, industrial robot manufacturing, special operation robot manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its vital flaw: the insured headcount is only 2 people, and the paid-in capital is 677,800 RMB. The most fatal spatial probe reveals its registered address is: 'Room 319, College Student Innovation and Entrepreneurship Park, Nanjing Institute of Technology.' This is an extremely typical micro-desk or single room (Room 319) of a 'student entrepreneurship incubator' inside a university campus. In a room of a university activity center, relying on 2 students (or faculty and students), it actually claims it will manufacture 'aerial vehicles' and 'industrial/special operation robots'? This is not only a trampling of industrial manufacturing common sense but also completely exceeds the physical and fire-safety bearing limits of a campus venue. After logical reconstruction, this is a pure 'University Spin-off Startup' (concept incubation team for university faculty and students). They might write drone flight control code in the lab, or buy parts to assemble a few consumer-grade robot prototypes for competitions or patent applications. All the grandiose 'manufacturing' tags are purely academic-level paper padding. The system has executed a demotion characterization on it.
